decision.summary: No new action: the weekly slate is still not live in this snapshot, and the available 74k floor markets are not cleanly aligned with the bearish thesis.
decision.rationale: State is clean and we are flat, but this 06:00 UTC snapshot still only shows stale April 19 daily markets and the expiring April 13-19 weekly board rather than a fresh weekly slate to enter early. The only live candidates with meaningful pricing are the 74k floor markets, but Beecthor's latest read still favors downside continuation and treats the 74.4k area as a first downside objective rather than a confident support-hold thesis. That makes a floor Yes bet too contradictory to the current directional setup, so the correct action is to stay flat and wait for either the real new weekly board or a cleaner support signal.
